headline: PPL’s Larger Capital Plan And Equity Offering Reshape Growth And Returns
summary: PPL Corporation (NYSE:PPL) has laid out a $23b capital investment plan focused on grid modernization and clean energy projects. The company has also completed a substantial composite units equity offering to help fund its long term plans. These moves point to a reshaping of PPL's operations and capital structure, with potential implications for its future earnings profile and shareholder outcomes. For investors watching utilities, PPL reaches this inflection point with shares at $38.98 and...
